letterContent.msg1: From the moment the two of you found each other, something in the universe shifted. Love — real, deep, enduring love — has a way of doing that. It rearranges the stars. It softens the edges of the world. It makes ordinary days feel like something sacred.
letterContent.p2: May your life together be a masterpiece of shared dreams and gentle understanding. May you always be each other's sanctuary, a place where you are fully seen, fully known, and completely loved.
letterContent.p3: Today, as you stand hand in hand, looking toward a future built together, remember that the greatest magic isn't in the grand gestures, but in the quiet shared glances and the strength you give one another.
letterContent.p4: With all my love and heartiest congratulations on your beautiful union.

wishes.title: Always Hand in Hand
wishes.text: May your path be easy and your burdens light. Walk together with grace.

wishes.title: A Home of Joy
wishes.text: May your home be filled with laughter and your hearts with peace.

wishes.title: Endless Love
wishes.text: May your love grow stronger with every sunrise and deeper with every moon.
